message.content: @startuml skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0 skinparam classFontName Arial skinparam classFontSize 14 skinparam classBackgroundColor #F5F5F5 skinparam classBorderColor black skinparam classFontColor black skinparam classStereotypeFontName Arial skinparam classStereotypeFontSize 14 skinparam classStereotypeFontColor black skinparam classStereotypeBackgroundColor #B0E0E6 skinparam classStereotypeBorderColor black class "Flyweight" as Flyweight { +opreate() } class "FlyweightImpl" as FlyweightImpl { +operate() } class "FlyweightFactory" as FlyweightFactory { -HashMap pool; +getFlyweight(String key) } FlyweightImpl --|> Flyweight FlyweightFactory --|> Flyweight note top of Flyweight A end note note top of FlyweightImpl C end note note top of FlyweightFactory C end note @enduml
